notes: Built from the documented ROCm nightly wheel lane instead of the generic CUDA nightly lane.
Startup completed on the dual RX 7900 XTX host.
Engine startup reached multimodal attention profiling but failed before readiness.
Observed HIP OOM while vLLM attempted a 256 GiB allocation path.
The build image itself remained healthy; this was a model/init path limit.

fixes.issue: generic nightly wheel lane pulled CUDA/NVIDIA dependencies
fixes.fix: switched to the documented ROCm nightly wheel lane from vLLM docs

fixes.issue: missing ROCm runtime libraries for torch/vLLM startup
fixes.fix: used the ROCm runtime package set in the wheel image rather than chasing individual CUDA-era dependencies
